name: Chocolate Chip Grape Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak Grape-Nuts in buttermilk for 10 minutes.
2. Beat sugar and eggs or egg substitute together in a large bowl.
3. Add the milk/Grape-Nuts mixture and vanilla to the bowl with the sugar and eggs.
4. Sift flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder into a separate bowl.
5. Stir the sifted ingredients thoroughly into the Grape-Nuts mixture.
6. Add chocolate chips and mix well.
7. Pour the batter evenly into 2 non-stick sprayed 9 x 5 loaf pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
9. Makes 2 loaves, serving approximately 20 portions.
